items.title: LB Greenlaw returns to 49ers as DE Huff retires
items.summary: Linebacker Dre Greenlaw is returning to the 49ers, agreeing to terms on a one-year, $7.5 million contract, a source told ESPN. Defensive end Bryce Huff, however, is retiring from the NFL, he announced.

items.title: Pass rusher Muhammad (11 sacks in '25) to Bucs
items.summary: Free agent defensive end Al-Quadin Muhammad has agreed to a one-year deal with the Buccaneers that's worth up to $6 million, according to NFL Network.

items.title: Colts re-sign QB Daniel Jones
items.summary: Jones started 13 games for the Colts in 2025 and finished the season third in the NFL in yards per attempt (8.1), fourth in completion percentage (68 percent) and sixth in passer rating (100.2).

items.title: Colts Re-Sign Daniel Jones
items.summary: For just the 2nd time in Chris Ballard’s tenure, a starting QB is returning to the Colts in consecutive years. While the Colts did put the transition tag on Jones, that didn’t guarantee his return with other teams able to still negotiate with him and the Colts able to void the tag if unsigned to […]

items.title: Colts, Daniel Jones agree on new contract
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The Indianapolis Colts and Daniel Jones are transitioning from the transition tag. The team and its starting quarterback agreed on a 2-year, $88 million extension that replaces the one-year, $37.833 million transition tag that was put in place March 3, according to a source. Jones could earn up to $100 million in incentives [...]

The Colts are going to get him at a very reasonable price on a […]

items.title: Braden Smith relocates to Houston Texans
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The Indianapolis Colts have lost another veteran. Long-time starting right tackle Braden Smith has agreed to a two-year, $25 million free-agent contract with the AFC South rival Houston Texans, according to multiple reports. The deal includes $13.5 million in guarantees. Smith, 29, has started 105 games since being selected in the second round [...]

items.title: Colts re-sign K Blake Grupe
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS — The Indianapolis Colts re-signed Blake Grupe, according to a source, giving them a quality backup or training camp competition at kicker. Grupe converted all 21 of his kicking attempts last season — 11 field goals, 10 PATs — as the Colts were forced to utilize three kickers for the first time in franchise [...]

items.title: Ryan Kelly retires after 10 seasons
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – Ten seasons were enough. Ryan Kelly, a 2016 first-round draft pick and anchor of the Indianapolis Colts for nine seasons, announced his retirement on Friday on his social media account. “What an incredible ride it was,’’ he posted on his X account. Kelly finished his career with the Minnesota Vikings in 2025, but [...]

It’s a guaranteed, one-year $37.833 million deal. However, it comes with risk. The transition tag allows Jones to [...]
